self.last_reconciliation: PR40 stack, active-document, and machine-native representation cleanup
self.rule: This file routes authority; it does not promote an evidence class or duplicate transient workflow conclusions.

exact_status.transient_acceptance: GitHub Actions and retained release records
exact_status.pull_request_record: the current cumulative integration pull request
exact_status.rule: Exact SHA, run number, and conclusion belong to the PR or retained release record.

decision.next_trace_state: not_created; begin only on the next branch with fresh authority extraction and computation

proof_classes.P0: representation calculation, score, embedding, mode, or simulation
proof_classes.P1: formal model-property proof or machine-checkable certificate, including valid eigenstructure
proof_classes.P4: external, deployment, pilot, or production acceptance
proof_classes.correspondence_rule: A stronger formal certificate may satisfy a software gate only when the gate defines and verifies the required model-to-system correspondence; no class is demoted and no class silently expands.

representation_policy.retention_rule: Retained artifacts expose generator, dimensions, provenance, assumptions, transformations, tolerances, validation, proof class, and a compact language bridge.

current_trace_roles.trace007: commercial/effect production transaction and computation baseline
current_trace_roles.trace008: release, recovery, and capacity implementation compression
current_trace_roles.trace009: UI projection architecture search and calibration
current_trace_roles.trace011: employee UI port and presentation adapters
current_trace_roles.trace012: UI Lab and folder-first UI variant standard
